hero.title: We Improve Your
hero.description: Nippur Pharma Factory - High-quality products according to international standards. We manufacture all forms of cephalosporin dosages and a wide range of eye drops and ampoules.

products.title: Our Pharmaceutical
products.description: We offer a wide range of high-quality pharmaceutical products, manufactured according to the highest international quality standards to ensure the safety and efficacy of each product.

oral.title: Oral Cephalosporin
oral.description: A complete range of high-quality oral antibiotics for treating various bacterial infections.

injectable.title: Injectable Cephalosporin
injectable.description: Effective and safe injectable solutions for medical use in cases requiring immediate and rapid doses.

ampoules.title: Ampoules
ampoules.description: Sterile ampoules with world-class quality standards for safely and effectively storing liquid medications.

eyedrops.title: Eye Drops
eyedrops.description: Effective treatments for various eye diseases, manufactured with high precision to ensure safety and efficacy.

products.ctaText: Want to know more about our products?

about.title: Nippur Pharma
about.description1: Nippur is a limited liability company under the laws of Iraq. We manufacture all forms of cephalosporin dosages and a wide range of eye drops and ampoules, using known sources of active ingredients and European equipment in a GMP-compliant facility.
about.description2: We strive to provide high-quality pharmaceutical products at affordable prices for everyone, to be a trusted partner in the journey of improving health for patients in Iraq and the region.

certified.title: Internationally Certified
certified.desc: We follow global quality standards in all production stages

vision.title: Our Vision &
vision.description: We strive to be pioneers in the Iraqi pharmaceutical industry, committed to the highest standards of quality and safety in every product we manufacture.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To improve the quality of Iraqi pharmaceutical products by manufacturing high-quality products according to Iraqi and international standards, and introducing a new production line for the Iraqi industry.

goal.title: Our Goal
goal.content: To establish a high-quality entity with unmatched expertise and qualified staff to provide the best products at affordable prices for patients.

commitment.title: Commitment
commitment.desc: Committed to the highest quality standards in every product

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Adopting the latest technologies in pharmaceutical manufacturing

improvement.title: Continuous Improvement
improvement.desc: Constantly striving to improve our products and services

service.title: Community Service
service.desc: We aim to improve the health of the Iraqi community

vision.quote: Nippur is a limited liability company under the laws of Iraq, striving to provide high-quality pharmaceutical products that meet patients' needs and contribute to building a healthier society.

quality.title: Our Responsibility
quality.description: As a new Iraqi pharmaceutical company, we are responsible for playing our part in building a resilient and healthier community by ensuring access to healthcare for all Iraqis. We believe that quality is not just a goal, but an ethical commitment to our patients and community.

responsibilities.title: Our Commitments to Society
items: Ensuring access to healthcare for all Iraqis
Providing pharmaceutical products at affordable prices
Contributing to building a healthier and more resilient community
Adhering to the highest professional ethics standards

assurance.title: Quality Assurance
assurance.desc: We apply strict standards at all production stages to ensure the quality of the final product.

control.title: Strict Control
control.desc: Thorough examination of all raw materials and products before market release.

standards.title: International Standards
standards.desc: Compliance with GMP standards and international pharmaceutical industry standards.

documentation.title: Complete Documentation
documentation.desc: Comprehensive documentation of all production and testing processes for tracking and review.

contact.title: Get In
contact.description: We are always happy to discuss new ideas and opportunities and can easily be contacted using the inquiry form below. We will respond as soon as possible.

success.title: Your message has been sent successfully!
success.desc: We will get back to you as soon as possible.

footer.description: Nippur is a limited liability company under the laws of Iraq, specializing in manufacturing high-quality pharmaceutical products according to international standards.

newsletter.title: Newsletter
newsletter.desc: Stay in touch with us to get the latest news and special offers.
